cases.question: What is your refund policy?
cases.answer: Refunds are available within 7 days with proof of purchase.

cases.question: Explain why metrics traces and logs work together
cases.answer: Metrics detect incidents, traces localize them, logs explain root cause.

cases.question: What should not appear in app logs?
cases.answer: PII and other sensitive data must not appear in application logs. Use sanitized summaries only.
